scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 3 legacy-parity read streams only (templates, submissions, submitters); DocuSeal's write endpoints (submission create, template create/clone/archive, submitter update) are out of scope (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

destructive template archival; not modeled by legacy
